name: Unusual Chicken Spices - Cardamon Rub
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind and blend all seasonings together.
2. Store the mixture in a small spice bottle.
3. Use this rub for poultry or lamb, as a seasoning for curries, vegetables, fruit salads, and occasionally for rice.
4. Example: Rub or dust on chicken (skin on) or cornish hens and bake at 375°F/190°C on a rack until crispy (about 1 hour or more).
5. Serve with saffron rice, garnished with orange slices and fresh chopped parsley. Fresh peas (snaps or shelled) complement the dish.
